subject: An ornate spherical artifact of woven gold filigree, glowing with warm inner light, displayed on a dark stone pedestal or surface
description: A hollow sphere constructed from interlaced bands of polished gold metalwork sits centered in the frame, its lattice openings revealing a brilliant warm radiance burning at its core. The light spills outward as soft golden bloom, catching on the curves of the metal and casting a halo into the surrounding shadow. The orb rests on a dark stone or wooden surface that fades into deep brown-black ambient gloom, isolating the artifact as the sole light source. The composition is reverent and still — a museum-piece presentation of a magical object, with no figures present.
foreground: ornate gold filigree sphere glowing from within, resting on a dark surface
background: deep shadowed interior space, indistinct dark brown to black gradient
emotion: reverent stillness; the object radiates quiet power
